supply_chain/episode_metrics.py.semantic_change: The later source added an explicit quarantined visible-v1 replay branch. The default request-snapshot-v2 path used by Program J is unchanged. The result remains bound to the execution hash and is not silently relabeled as a current-code execution.

metric_contract.runner_binding: extract reads run_policy outcome ret_excel_visible; compute_episode_metrics binds that field to the request-snapshot-v2 aggregator
metric_contract.post_run_compatibility_note: episode_metrics later gained an explicit legacy visible-v1 replay branch. The default and Program-J extraction remain request-snapshot-v2. source_bindings addresses the current audited tree, while execution_time_source_exceptions preserves the exact execution hash.
metric_contract.endogenous_snapshot_limit: Exact workbook replay uses injected source Bt/Ut. Native DES request snapshots are implemented but the same-timestamp event order remains pending Garrido confirmation.
metric_contract.quantity_guardrail_scope: ration_ret_excel remains the full generated-order quantity-weighted formula, while ret_excel_cvar05 is computed from request-snapshot-v2 visible rows; this cross-population guardrail is allowed only if disclosed and frozen.

evaluated_contract.scope: single central cell of the disclosed full-DES serial-WIP Op5-Op7 maintenance extension

open_loop_and_pi_audit.static_comparator: development-block convex mixture over all 6,561 full-horizon schedules, optimized for mean request-snapshot ReT subject to aggregate guardrails relative to the historical reference
open_loop_and_pi_audit.pi_relaxation: one tape-contingent convex distribution over all 6,561 schedules per tape, optimized under the same aggregate guardrail directions
open_loop_and_pi_audit.valid_if_all_result_conditions_pass: A retrospective, central-cell, finite-sample PI-versus-complete-open-loop point diagnostic under the named aggregate resource and outcome constraints.
not_established: strongest-admissible-comparator H_PI under the current task definition
open_loop_and_pi_audit.convexification_limit: A fractional PI solution is a randomized full-information relaxation. Store the weights and report a deterministic or integer-feasible counterpart before interpreting action-ranking diversity or a deployable oracle schedule.

runner_reported_guardrail_relative_to_hi.interpretation: This is the runner's stricter outcome-guardrailed relaxation. It is not the resource-only H_PI estimand because service, quantity and tail outcomes are used as admissibility constraints.

resource_only_envelope.definition: Every schedule has 192 executed preventive hours and zero mass residual; corrective crew-hours are capped at the historical reference mean B=5.2351916879496345.
resource_only_envelope.B_sensitivity: The cap does not change the best deterministic static or deterministic tape-wise PI value in this matrix; both also win when only the equal 192-hour scheduled/executed PM right is imposed. B must nevertheless be frozen before a new evaluation.
resource_only_envelope.interpretation: This is a valid central-block development PI-versus-complete-open-loop point diagnostic under the provisional resource slice. It is more than fifty-four-fold below the 0.01 practical gate, but twelve central-cell tapes cannot certify a population or family-wide ceiling.

deterministic_resource_only_pi_minus_bes.interpretation: Service loss, quantity ReT and flow fill improve, but CVaR05 worsens. Therefore even the resource-only PI diagnostic does not satisfy the simultaneous guardrail gate.

resource_acceptance.scheduled_preventive_rights: Exactly one 24-hour PM request per week for every sequence, hence 192 scheduled hours over eight weeks by construction.
resource_acceptance.corrective_crew_hours: Endogenous but budgeted; both static and PI LPs constrain their mean to be non-superior to the comparator.
resource_acceptance.executed_preventive_hours: Not constrained inside either LP. The runner only reports a post-optimization allclose check against 192 hours.
resource_acceptance.mass_conservation: Not constrained or fail-closed. The runner only reports the maximum residual after optimization.
resource_acceptance.fail_closed_rule: If any required result condition fails or is missing, no development H_PI diagnostic is admissible even if delta_ret_visible is positive.
resource_acceptance.remaining_resource_evidence_gap: The output omits per-tape tape hashes, demand/sensor/R14 consumed-ledger hashes, complete maintenance action-event trajectories and a total in-horizon crew-hours ledger.

guardrail_completeness.aggregate_constraint_limit: Mean aggregate constraints may compensate harms across tapes. They do not establish paired confidence-bound noninferiority for a frozen policy.

mandatory_missing_comparators: round-robin calendar as an explicit named baseline
properly tuned condition-based maintenance index or Whittle-style comparator
exact or approximate DP/belief policy on a validated state abstraction
observable_policy_inference_missing: fresh holdout evaluation after calibration-only tuning
paired confidence intervals and practical effect threshold
sensor shuffle, delay and wrong-station placebos

statistical_scope.interpretation: development sample-average optimization only; no population lower or upper confidence bound and no connected-region stability

provenance_audit.raw_matrix_design: NPZ preserves seeds, all sequences, field names and the complete numeric matrix and is content-hashed by the verdict.
strengths: deterministic seed order after parallel evaluation
result refuses to overwrite existing verdict and raw matrix
defects: the repository_head recorded by the runner does not contain the untracked runner or the modified request-snapshot implementation
no runner, contract or core-source hashes are embedded in the verdict
no independent replay or solver-weight artifact
provenance_audit.promotion_rule: Commit and hash runner plus metric implementation before any new calibration or confirmatory run. Treat this local execution as retrospective development evidence only.

claim_boundary.positive_result_rule: The resource-only point delta is positive but 54.724 times below the practical gate and has a CVaR05 contradiction. It does not reopen a learner.
claim_boundary.small_or_null_result_rule: The central development point is a strong local null diagnostic, not a confidence-bounded or family-wide ceiling. It cannot close Program J across the other 107 frozen cells without a complete cell-wise ceiling or a justified global bound.

required_next: Fail closed on executed preventive hours and mass residual before solving or reporting the frontier.
Persist per-tape exogenous hashes, PI weights or deterministic selections, action trajectories and full resource/guardrail ledgers.
Report paired guardrail deltas and uncertainty; do not infer noninferiority from LP mean constraints.
If development PI remains material, freeze and evaluate the complete classical/observable comparator set on a disjoint burned holdout before any learner.
Resolve the request-snapshot same-time convention with Garrido before virgin confirmation.
Use the frozen 108-cell design or a preregistered connected subset before any family-level statement.
